action_set_definitions.name: get_grid_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current operational metrics of the power grid, including demand, renewable output, battery state, thermal output, and frequency.

action_set_definitions.name: set_thermal_generation
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the power output level of the backup thermal power plant.

target_output_mw.description: The desired power output of the thermal plant in Megawatts (MW).

action_set_definitions.name: set_ev_dispatch
action_set_definitions.description: Commands the aggregated EV fleet battery system to discharge energy to the grid or charge from the grid.

discharge_rate_mw.description: The power rate to discharge. Positive values indicate discharging (grid supply), negative values indicate charging (grid demand).

state_description.time_step_hour: The current hour of the simulation (0-23).
state_description.load_demand_mw: The current total power demand from the grid in Megawatts.
state_description.solar_output_mw: Current power being generated by solar arrays.
state_description.wind_output_mw: Current power being generated by wind turbines.
state_description.battery_soc_mwh: Current State of Charge (energy stored) in the battery system in Megawatt-hours.
state_description.battery_max_capacity_mwh: Maximum energy storage capacity of the battery system.
state_description.thermal_plant_status_mw: Current output level of the backup thermal power plant.
state_description.grid_frequency_hz: Current grid frequency; deviation from 60.0 indicates supply/demand imbalance.
